mapper.insert: insert into kb_documents (id, base_id, name, content_rich, content_format, chunk_strategy) values (#{id}, #{baseId}, #{name}, #{contentRich}, #{contentFormat}, #{chunkStrategy})
mapper.select: select d.id, d.base_id, b.kb_key, d.name, d.content_format, d.chunk_strategy, d.created_at, coalesce(ch.cnt, 0) ::int as chunk_count from kb_documents d join kb_bases b on b.id = d.base_id left join (select document_id, count(*) ::bigint as cnt from kb_chunks group by document_id) ch on ch.document_id = d.id where d.base_id = #{baseId} order by d.created_at desc offset #{offset} limit #{limit}

select d.id, d.base_id, b.kb_key, d.name, d.content_rich, d.content_format, d.chunk_strategy, d.created_at, null::int as chunk_count from kb_documents d join kb_bases b on b.id = d.base_id where d.id = #{id}
